description: Typo in column name: namr -> name
fixed_query:
SELECT name, current_balance
FROM brex_data.account
WHERE current_balance > 0
ORDER BY current_balance DESC
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT namr, current_balance
FROM brex_data.account
WHERE current_balance > 0
ORDER BY current_balance DESC
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: column "namr" does not exist
  Hint: Perhaps you meant to reference the column "account.name".
  Position: 126
